---
title: "Transformer Architecture"
subtitle: "Decoders"
author: "Miguel Fonseca"
format:
  revealjs:
    toc: true
---

# Transformer Decoders

## Transformer Decoder Block

Components:

1. Masked self-attention
2. Feed-forward network

---

## Decoder Architecture

![Decoder](/images/transformer_decoder.png)

# Causal Self-Attention

## Causal (Masked) Attention

Prevent future leakage:

$$
\mathbf{M}_{i,j} =
\begin{cases}
0 & j \le i \\
-\infty & j > i
\end{cases}
$$

### Masked Attention Formula

$$
\text{softmax}\left(\frac{\mathbf{Q}\mathbf{K}^\top + \mathbf{M}}{\sqrt{d_k}}\right)
$$

---

## Visual: Causal Mask

$$
\begin{bmatrix}
1 & 0 & 0 & 0 \\
1 & 1 & 0 & 0 \\
1 & 1 & 1 & 0 \\
1 & 1 & 1 & 1
\end{bmatrix}
$$

---

## Why Masking?

During training:

- **input:** "The cat"
- **target:** "cat sat"

>Must not see future tokens

| $t$ | 1 | 2 | $\cdots$ | $T - 1$ | $T$ |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| target | $\mathbf x_2$ | $\mathbf x_3$ | $\cdots$ | $\mathbf x_{T}$ | $\mathbf x_{T + 1}$ |
| input | | $\mathbf x_1$ | $\cdots$ | $\mathbf x_{T - 1}$ | $\mathbf x_{T}$ |



# Positional Encoding

## Positional Encoding (Problem)

:::{.callout-warning title="Problem"}
Self-attention ignores order!
:::

**Solution:**

- Add positional information

---

## Sinusoidal Encoding

$$
\text{PE}(p, 2i) = \sin\left(\frac{p}{K^{2i/d}}\right)
$$

$$
\text{PE}(p, 2i+1) = \cos\left(\frac{p}{K^{2i/d}}\right)
$$

### Properties

- Unique representation per position
- Linear relation between positions
- No learned parameters

### Why Summation Works

$$
\mathbf x_{\text{final}} = \mathbf x_{\text{embedding}} + \text{PE}
$$

**Because:**

- same dimension
- model learns to separate signals

### Intuition

- Embedding → *what*
- Position → *where*

---

![Positional Encoding](/images/positional_encoding.png)

# Implementation

## Masked Attention in TensorFlow 2

```{python}
import tensorflow as tf

x = tf.random.uniform((1, 3, 4))  # (batch_size, seq_len, d_model)
seq_len = tf.shape(x)[1]

mask = tf.linalg.band_part(tf.ones((seq_len, seq_len)), -1, 0)

attention = tf.keras.layers.MultiHeadAttention(
    num_heads=4,
    key_dim=64
)

mask = tf.linalg.band_part(tf.ones((seq_len, seq_len)), -1, 0)

output = attention(
    query=x,
    value=x,
    key=x,
    attention_mask=mask
)

output
```

---

## Decoder Block in TensorFlow 2

```{python}
class DecoderBlock(tf.keras.layers.Layer):
    def __init__(self, d_model, num_heads):
        super().__init__()
        self.attn = tf.keras.layers.MultiHeadAttention(num_heads, d_model)
        self.ffn = tf.keras.Sequential([
            tf.keras.layers.Dense(4*d_model, activation='relu'),
            tf.keras.layers.Dense(d_model)
        ])
        self.norm1 = tf.keras.layers.LayerNormalization()
        self.norm2 = tf.keras.layers.LayerNormalization()

    def call(self, x, mask=None):
        attn_output = self.attn(x, x, attention_mask=mask)
        x = self.norm1(x + attn_output)
        ffn_output = self.ffn(x)
        return self.norm2(x + ffn_output)
```

---

## Natural Language Processing (NLP)

### Training Objective

**Predict next token**

- Cross-entropy loss
$$
\mathscr L = -\sum y \log(\widehat{y})
$$

> Teacher forcing: use true tokens as input during training

    - Target is the next token after input in the sequence

### Example: Language Modeling

:::{.columns}
::::{.column width="50%"}
**Input:**

"The market is"
::::
::::{.column width="50%"}
**Predictions:**

- "bullish"
- "volatile"
::::
:::
